title: Redeem Her Honor
original_title: Kapag May Katwiran... Ipaglaban Mo: The Movie
overview: The melding together of two separate stories that share a similar premise - each detail the account of a young Filipino woman who becomes a victim of sexual violence and takes her attacker to court.
